Author: Sushii-dev (originally by grimgrum)
Name: Veiled Aim (BDO + ER)
Punchline: BDO-style cursor-driven action camera with Elden Ring-style soft targeting.
Description: Press a key to hide the cursor — your character auto-faces the camera, the mouse rotates it freely, and the most-centred hostile enemy in your field of view becomes a soft target (yellow outline + red ring, ReAction 'Field Target' and 'Soft Target' pronoun compatible). Any UI popup that shows the cursor pauses the camera; press the key again to resume. Configurable hard-target keybind (cone pauses while a hard target is locked, auto-resumes when it dies/despawns/clears), click-to-target suppression while the camera is active, and per-scenario auto-resume exemptions for menus / cutscenes / dialogues / zone transitions. Originally forked from grimgrum/action-cam-for-FFXIV — the camera activation model, targeting pipeline, and input handling have been rewritten.
